headline: EXPE Q1 Deep Dive: Margin Expansion and B2B Growth Amid Macro Volatility
summary: Online travel agency Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 14.7% year on year to $3.43 billion. Guidance for next quarter’s revenue was better than expected at $4.16 billion at the midpoint, 1% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.96 per share was 42.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: TikTok now wants to be the place you book the trip you just saw on TikTok
summary: TikTok is systematically converting its discovery engine into a transaction layer, which both deepens user retention and opens entirely new revenue streams for its new owners.

raw.headline: TikTok now wants to be the place you book the trip you just saw on TikTok

headline: Evention Launches OTA Recon to Recover the $430,000 Most Hotels Don't Know They're Losing Every Year
summary: At many hotels, OTAs like Expedia and Booking.com drive a large portion of bookings, in many cases nearing 50% of total volume, making them the industry's dominant distribution channel. But behind every OTA reservation is a reconciliation process that most properties are not equipped to manage. Evention analysis shows a single booking can touch up to seven systems before it is fully settled, and without daily transaction-level validation, errors compound quietly and continuously.
